demographics.audit_notes: Corrected all 1990 values based on US Census data for Tract 17.06. Original values (e.g., total: 1520) were implausibly low and appeared to be part of a flawed linear model. Corrected pct_white to be non-Hispanic white.
Original data followed a flawed linear trend. Values have been re-interpolated based on corrected 1990 and 2000 Census anchor points for Tract 17.06.

Corrected values based on US Census 2000 data for Tract 17.06. Original total population (2340) was incorrect; actual population was stable from 1990. Original median age (40.8) and homeownership (85.8) were also low. Corrected pct_white to be non-Hispanic white.

Corrected values based on US Census 2010 data for Tract 17.06. Original values (total: 3000, median_age: 43, pct_white: 87.7) were inaccurate. Corrected pct_white to be non-Hispanic white.
Original data appears to be a simple interpolation. Switched to using rolling ACS 5-year estimates for higher accuracy post-2010.

Corrected values based on 2020 Census and ACS 2016-2020 data for Tract 17.06. Original total (4070) was very close. Original median age (44.2) was too low, and racial percentages showed more diversification than observed in ACS data.
Original data is a plausible projection. Replaced with ACS 2017-2021 estimates for better grounding.
